title: Lead Frontend Developer at Razorpay Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Lead Frontend Developer at Razorpay Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
Razorpay Asia Pacific Associates has an exciting opening for a Frontend Developer at our Srinagar office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Razorpay Asia Pacific Associates:
Razorpay Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Node.js

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Razorpay Asia Pacific Associates!
